about.index.metadata.title: About
about.index.title: About 6529
about.subscriptions.hero.title: Choose your Meme Cards. Skip the drop-time scramble.
about.subscriptions.hero.body: Add a balance, choose the Meme Cards you want, and 6529 can mint eligible drops for you—even when you are offline.
about.subscriptions.action.connectHero: Connect wallet to subscribe from the introduction
about.subscriptions.action.connectFinal: Connect wallet to subscribe after reading the guide
about.subscriptions.action.manageFinal: Manage subscriptions after reading the guide
about.subscriptions.benefits.choice.body: This is not a mintpass. You can choose whether to mint each Meme Card and can still use the regular minting process.
about.subscriptions.benefits.remote.body: Make your decision ahead of time instead of being at your computer for every Monday, Wednesday, and Friday drop.
about.subscriptions.benefits.gas.title: Spend less on gas
about.subscriptions.benefits.gas.body: A low-cost ETH transfer can fund several future mints, with estimated gas savings of about {oneCardPercent} for one card and up to {tenCardPercent} for ten.
about.subscriptions.notMintpass.title: Your eligibility does not change.
about.subscriptions.notMintpass.body: Subscription minting follows the same allowlists and phases as regular minting. It is best understood as remote minting, not extra access.
about.subscriptions.how.title: From setup to airdrop in four steps
about.subscriptions.how.body: Your profile is the control center. It shows your balance, upcoming cards, minting mode, delivery address, and history.
about.subscriptions.steps.open.title: Open your subscriptions
about.subscriptions.steps.open.body: Connect your wallet and go to your profile's Subscriptions tab. The action on this page takes you directly there after connection.
about.subscriptions.steps.fund.title: Add a minting balance
about.subscriptions.steps.fund.body: Use the calculator and top-up instructions on your profile to add ETH for future cards. Funds are completely non-refundable.
about.subscriptions.steps.choose.title: Choose how you want to mint
about.subscriptions.steps.choose.body: Automatic mode mints eligible cards until your balance is used. Manual mode only mints the specific cards you opt into.
about.subscriptions.steps.receive.title: Receive eligible cards
about.subscriptions.steps.receive.body: If a card is available in your eligible phase, it is sent to the airdrop address shown on your profile. Otherwise, your balance remains available.
about.subscriptions.after.title: Your profile keeps you in control
about.subscriptions.after.balance.title: Your balance carries forward
about.subscriptions.after.balance.body: Your balance stays available until it is used for cards you mint. Skipping a card does not spend it.
about.subscriptions.after.eligibility.bo: Only Phase 0 guarantees a mint. Phase 1 and Phase 2 depend on card availability and the order subscription payments were received.
about.subscriptions.after.delivery.title: Cards arrive by airdrop
about.subscriptions.after.delivery.body: Your profile shows the address that will receive cards. If you use delegation or multiple wallet roles, review the routing reference below.
about.subscriptions.important.title: Before you fund your balance
about.subscriptions.important.nonRefunda: Every amount sent is completely non-refundable, even if you later decide not to mint a card.
about.subscriptions.important.deadline: Top-ups must be received by 00:00 UTC on the day before the mint. In automatic mode, turn off that card before the same deadline. Later top-ups roll to the next mint.
about.subscriptions.important.optional: Subscriptions are optional. You can continue minting normally without setting one up.
about.subscriptions.reference.title: The complete mechanics, when you need them
about.subscriptions.reference.body: Open a section for exact deadlines, minting modes, delegation routing, phase allocation, and gas calculations. All of the detailed rules are preserved here.
about.subscriptions.reference.funding.su: Where to send ETH, how the calculator works, and when funding must arrive.
about.subscriptions.reference.funding.se: You can top up your minting balance at any time by sending ETH to seize.6529.eth from any wallet in your consolidation.
about.subscriptions.reference.funding.no: Any amount sent to seize.6529.eth is completely non-refundable:
you can choose which cards to mint, but 6529 does not have the capacity to send ETH back.
about.subscriptions.reference.funding.ca: The calculator on your profile calculates the amount to send for any number of cards, with options for the remainder of the SZN or the remainder of the year.
about.subscriptions.reference.funding.pr: The balance appears on the site profile associated with the ETH-sending address.
about.subscriptions.reference.funding.de: Top-ups must be received by 00:00 UTC (for example, 19:00 EST) the day before a Meme Card mint to be eligible for that mint. Later top-ups roll over to the next mint.
about.subscriptions.reference.modes.summ: How cards are selected, how to opt out, and the weekly decision schedule.
about.subscriptions.reference.modes.auto: Automatic mode is the default. It auto-mints, by airdrop, as many Meme Cards as you are eligible for until your balance is used, enabling a set-it-and-forget-it approach for whole SZNs.
about.subscriptions.reference.modes.optO: In automatic mode, you can opt out of any specific Meme Card mint.
Turn off minting for that drop before 00:00 UTC (for example, 19:00 EST) on the day before the mint.
about.subscriptions.reference.modes.reve: The card reveal moves forward by one day so you can see the card before deciding whether to mint it.
about.subscriptions.reference.modes.sche: That gives you Sunday to opt out of Monday's card, Tuesday for Wednesday's card, and Thursday for Friday's card.
about.subscriptions.reference.modes.manu: You can move your whole profile to manual mode. In that mode, no cards mint unless you opt in to the specific cards you want.
about.subscriptions.reference.delegation: The exact order used to decide which wallet receives a card.
Your card is airdropped using the following criteria.
With a consolidation but no delegation, the card goes to the consolidation's primary address.
With no consolidation, the card goes to the address that sent the ETH.
When a delegation exists, delivery follows this order:
The delegated address for The Memes with the Airdrop use case.
The delegated address for The Memes with the All use case.
The delegated address for Any Collection with the Airdrop use case.
The delegated address for Any Collection with the All use case.
If you use the suggested TAP vault/warm/hot consolidation, your vault delegates All to warm or hot, and you want airdrops delivered directly to the vault, 6529 recommends:
Send ETH to seize.6529.eth from the warm or hot address.
From that address, add an Airdrop delegation for The Memes to your vault.

If one unconsolidated address delegates All to a minting address, sending ETH from the original address routes the airdrop to the minting address. To have the original address receive it instead, change the delegation use case from All to Minting.
about.subscriptions.reference.phases.sum: Eligibility, guarantees, availability, and ordering for popular mints.
about.subscriptions.reference.phases.sam: Subscription minting uses the same allowlists and phases as regular minting.
about.subscriptions.reference.phases.zer: If you are in Phase 0, the card is automatically airdropped at the beginning of Phase 0. Because Phase 0 is underallocated, the mint is guaranteed.
about.subscriptions.reference.phases.one: If you are eligible for Phase 1 or Phase 2, the card is airdropped at the beginning of your eligible phase.
about.subscriptions.reference.phases.una: If no cards are available in that phase, no card is airdropped and your balance remains available.
about.subscriptions.reference.phases.ord: If a phase begins with more subscription mints than available cards, cards are airdropped in the order subscription payments were received.
about.subscriptions.reference.phases.gua: As with regular minting, only Phase 0 guarantees a mint.
about.subscriptions.reference.phases.pop: For popular mints, your opportunity depends on your phase, the number of subscription mints for that card, and when you subscribed relative to other subscribers.
about.subscriptions.reference.gas.title: Gas savings calculations
about.subscriptions.reference.gas.summar: The cost assumptions behind the approximately {oneCardPercent} to {tenCardPercent} estimates.
about.subscriptions.reference.gas.contex: Meme Cards cost {cardPrice} ETH, so high Ethereum gas can become a substantial share of the card's cost.
about.subscriptions.reference.gas.gwei20: At {gwei} gwei, gas makes up approximately {percent} of the card's cost.
At {gwei} gwei, gas makes up approximately {percent} of the card's cost.
about.subscriptions.reference.gas.transf: ETH transfers are the lowest-cost transaction on the Ethereum network.
about.subscriptions.reference.gas.oneCar: Subscription-minting one card at a time saves approximately {percent} in gas costs.
about.subscriptions.reference.gas.tenCar: Subscription-minting ten cards with one ETH transfer saves approximately {percent} in gas costs.
about.subscriptions.reference.gas.absorb: The Memes absorbs the airdrop gas cost internally, so it is not charged to the collector.
about.subscriptions.reference.remote.sum: How subscriptions separate a collecting decision from the live mint time.
about.subscriptions.reference.remote.bus: Many collectors cannot be available three times per week at mint time because of personal or professional commitments.
about.subscriptions.reference.remote.sep: Subscription minting separates the decision to mint a series or a specific Meme Card from the exact time of the mint.
about.subscriptions.reference.remote.tim: This helps all collectors, especially those in time zones that do not overlap well with minting time.
about.subscriptions.reference.reportLead: See aggregate projected and redeemed subscription counts.
about.subscriptions.final.title: Set up subscription minting from your profile
about.subscriptions.final.body: Connect your wallet to open the subscriptions flow, or return to your profile to manage an existing setup.
